cases.name: local-smoke-test-mode-selection
cases.prompt: Help me run a Torc workflow locally before I submit it to HPC.

cases.name: slurm-generated-spec-boundary
cases.prompt: How do I submit this Torc workflow to Slurm?

cases.name: hpc-profile-discovery
cases.prompt: How do I see whether Torc knows my HPC system and what partitions it can use?

cases.name: remote-workers-native-flow
cases.prompt: Set up Torc remote workers on two SSH hosts and show me how to collect logs.

mustNotMention: custom ssh loop as the primary flow

cases.name: remote-workers-version-mismatch
cases.prompt: torc remote run says the worker versions do not match. What should I do?

cases.name: manual-remote-fallback-boundary
cases.prompt: I need to run a non-Torc remote command on the cluster and fetch logs back. Should I use run-remote?

cases.name: versioned-remote-run-no-repo-rsync
cases.prompt: I need to run branch feature-x remotely on the cluster without rsyncing the whole repo.

cases.name: cleanup-edge-case
cases.prompt: We create temporary remote worktrees for versioned runs. How should cleanup work if the job fails?
